title: Host event bus behavior lane precheck
delta_summary: emit_client_input_requested now accepts prompt/options in addition to questions
payload build remains backward-compatible: optional fields only

risk_signals.evidence: older ask_user callers rely on prompt/options path while ask_user_multiple uses questions array
risk_signals.impact: without compatibility fields, client_input_requested payload may omit single-question UI hints

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/tests/test_event_loop_node.py -k "ask_user or client_input_requested" -q
uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_telegram_bridge.py -k "input_requested or ask_user or question" -q
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if compatibility envelope is preserved and event/bridge tests are green
